name: @memberjunction/react-linter
description: Static-analysis lint engine for MemberJunction interactive React components. Browser-free: Babel AST + TypeScript-based validation only. Safe to depend on from server-side actions, CLI tooling, and (eventually) Component Studio in the browser. The companion package @memberjunction/react-test-harness layers Playwright-based runtime execution on top of these rules.
author: MemberJunction.com
